_scoping_intent: Project-scoped MCP allowlist for yesid.dev. Committed so it travels with the repo. Per Slice 17j Task 4 + research in <cloud>/workflow-knowledge/token-efficacy/02-mcp-scoping.md. Known gotcha: enabledMcpjsonServers MUST live here (.claude/settings.json), NOT in .claude/settings.local.json — see issue #24657.
_user_scope_cleanup_note: User-scope MCPs that are NOT in the list above should be pruned from ~/.claude.json during Slice 17j Task 5. Examples to remove from user scope (not used in yesid.dev): Railway, firefox-devtools, Neon, Notion, Webflow, Postman, Cloudflare, tax tools, calendar. If any becomes needed in a specific future project, add to that project's .mcp.json.
